steps.title: Use the honor clue
steps.content: The fellowship honors exceptional artists, and Henry "Fiddler" Carter was chosen because he contributed greatly to the arts. The blank needs a word for the notable accomplishments that would make an artist worthy of recognition.

steps.title: Remove illogical nouns
steps.content: Choice B means feelings of distrust, which does not fit being honored for artistic contributions. Choice C means things accepted without proof, not accomplishments. Choice D means forecasts about the future, not work already contributed to the arts. The answer is A.
